lines.lyric_translation: All eyes on us (us)

lines.lyric_hangul: 태양 위를 달리는 마차 (계속 달려 oh)
lines.lyric_translation: Chariot riding across the sun (Keep riding uh)

lines.lyric_hangul: Uh, juicy, juicy, uh, juicy, juicy
lines.lyric_translation: Juicy juicy juicy juicy

lines.lyric_hangul: 총성이 울려 퍼진 다음 (spicy 한 feelin')
lines.lyric_translation: When the gunshot’s all done ringin’ (That spicy feelin’)

lines.lyric_hangul: 태양을 마음에다 쏴 (I just wanna do this)
lines.lyric_translation: Aim and shoot the sun at your heart (I just wanna do this)
Juicy juicy

lines.lyric_hangul: 음악 소리 크게 turn up (ooh, ooh)
lines.lyric_translation: Turn up the music
Run across the world all fierce

lines.lyric_hangul: 태양을 뒤에 달고 밟아 경적 울려, 우리답게 fire (우리답게)
lines.lyric_translation: Sun in tow, step on it / Honk the horn, we be us and fire (we be us)
No need to imitate

lines.lyric_hangul: 우리 방식대로 더 더 (우리 방식대로 더 더)
lines.lyric_translation: More, more like how we do it / Say ah, HOT HOT HOT
No night just day, the sky scorched red

lines.lyric_hangul: 모든 세상에 빛은 하나인 듯해 (하나 된 듯이)
lines.lyric_translation: Like the world’s in monochrome (like it’s become one tone)
Deep overwhelming breaths and superheated rhythm vibe
Wager my road on the sun of fate / Follow me, go

lines.lyric_hangul: 우리는 drop it like hot, hot, hot (oh, 지금 feelin' so hot)
lines.lyric_translation: We drop it like HOT HOT HOT / (Oh we feelin’ so HOT)

parts.lyric: Urineun Drop it like HOT HOT HOT

lines.lyric_hangul: 이 노래 burnin' like hot, hot, hot, hot (boom-brr-boom-boom)
lines.lyric_translation: This song’s burnin like HOT HOT HOT HOT / (Boom brr boom boom)

parts.lyric: I norae Burnin’ like HOT HOT HOT HOT

lines.lyric_hangul: 우리는 drop it like hot, hot, hot (oh, 지금 feelin' so hot)
lines.lyric_translation: We drop it like HOT HOT HOT / (Oh we feelin’ so HOT)

parts.lyric: Urineun Drop it like HOT HOT HOT

lines.lyric_hangul: Yeah, I'm runnin' too hot, hot, hot, hot (boom-brr-boom-boom)
lines.lyric_translation: Yeah I’m runnin’ too HOT HOT HOT HOT / (Boom brr boom boom)

parts.lyric: Yeah I’m runnin’ too HOT HOT HOT HOT

lines.lyric_translation: Face the sun, set it on fire
So HOT (Boom brr boom boom)
Face the sun, set it on fire
This song’s sizzlin’, everybody join in
Ay, blow the horn
Drive away through the desert waves

lines.lyric: I don’t want uh one more chance
lines.lyric_hangul: Ayy, I don't want, uh, one more chance
lines.lyric_translation: I don’t want uh one more chance
This moment, I’m goin’ all in
Shadow cast with my back to the sun
Turns to light again
Yeah, heart set on fire
No lie, we sure

lines.lyric: Teojil geotman gata I can’t breathe
lines.lyric_hangul: 터질 것만 같아 I can't breathe
lines.lyric_translation: About to burst, I can’t breathe
My burning heart (won’t listen to me)
Deep overwhelming breaths and superheated rhythm vibe

lines.lyric_hangul: Ayy, you know what to do, hey, you know what to do
lines.lyric_translation: You know what to do / Hey you know what to do

lines.lyric: Urin Through the fire hangyereul dashi neomeo

lines.lyric_translation: We’ll go through the fire, jump the limit once more
